name: tejram
description: A modern, responsive, full-stack corporate help desk ticketing system built with the MERN stack and TypeScript (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js).

scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
